product: Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines template in bundles in the workspace…
tagline: You can now easily create an ETL pipeline in a bundle in the workspace using the new Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines template project.
what_it_does: You can now easily create an ETL pipeline in a bundle in the workspace using the new Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines template project. Declarative Automation Bundles can be created and modified directly in the workspace. For requirements for using bundles in the workspace, see Declarative Automation Bundles in the workspace requirements.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: notebook: path: ../testpipeline.ipynb serverless: true
capabilities.desc: notebook: path: ../testpipeline.ipynb serverless: true catalog: main target: testpipeline${bundle.environment}

capabilities.title: glob: include: transformations/ serverless: true
capabilities.desc: glob: include: transformations/ serverless: true catalog: main schema: ${workspace.currentuser.shortname} rootpath: .

key_takeaway: You can now easily create an ETL pipeline in a bundle in the workspace using the new Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines template project.
